message:
feat(highlighter): add Python Rich highlighter parity module

Implement the rich.highlighter subsystem with full trait hierarchy:

- Highlighter trait: post-processes Text by adding style spans
- NullHighlighter: no-op implementation
- RegexHighlighter: applies named-group regex patterns to text,
  mapping capture group names to style names
- ReprHighlighter: highlights Python repr-style literals
  (numbers, strings, booleans, UUIDs, URLs, etc.)
- Added fancy-regex dependency for look-around support needed
  by ReprHighlighter patterns
- Exported in prelude for ergonomic access

230 lines, mirrors Python Rich's highlighter module.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -19,6 +19,9 @@ bitflags = "2.10"
 # Regular expressions for markup parsing
 regex = "1.12"
 
+# Advanced regex features (look-around) for Rich parity highlighters
+fancy-regex = "0.14.0"
+
 # Terminal detection and raw terminal manipulation
 crossterm = "0.29"
